channel.title: Posts on Linuxo blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Linuxo blog

item.title: Hugo Workflow on Android
item.description: Hugo is very versatile. It can be used on various software environments, including Android.

item.title: Hugo 0.55.6: One Bug Fix!
item.description: This is a bug-fix release with one important fix. There have been reports about infrequent paginator crashes when running the Hugo server since 0.55.0. The reason have been narrowed down to that of parallel rebuilds. This isn’t a new thing, but the changes in 0.55.0 made it extra important to serialize the page initialization. This release fixes that by protecting the Build method with a lock when running in server mode.
